member.name: T:Client
member.summary: Managed client for use on the Hedera Hashgraph Network.

member.name: M:Client.#ctor(ExecutorService,Network,MirrorNetwork,System.TimeSpan,System.Boolean,System.TimeSpan,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)
member.summary: Current name of the Network; corresponds to ledger ID in entity ID checksum calculations.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_2
member.summary: Replace all nodes in this Client with the nodes in the Address Book and update the address book if necessary.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_3
member.summary: Enable or disable automatic entity ID checksum validation.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_4
member.summary: Should the transaction ID be regenerated by default.

member.name: M:Client.GetRestBaseUrl
member.summary: Build the REST base URL for the next healthy mirror node. Returns a string like `https://host[:port]/api/v1`. If the selected mirror node is a local host (localhost/127.0.0.1) returns `http://localhost:{5551|8545}/api/v1`.

member.name: T:Client_2
member.summary:
Set if transport security should be used to connect to mirror nodes.
If transport security is enabled all connections to mirror nodes will use TLS.
member.remarks: @deprecated Mirror nodes can only be accessed using TLS.

member.name: T:Client_3
member.summary: Is tls enabled for mirror nodes.

member.name: T:Client_4
member.summary: Is tls enabled for consensus nodes.

member.name: T:Client_5
member.summary: Is certificate verification enabled.

member.name: P:Client.Realm
member.summary: Get the current default realm for new Client instances.

member.name: P:Client.Shard
member.summary: Get the current default shard for new Client instances.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_5
member.summary: Max number of attempts a request executed with this client will do.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_6
member.summary: Max number of times any node in the Network can receive a bad gRPC status before being removed.

member.name: M:Client.FromTicks(Volatile.Read(ref)
member.summary: The minimum amount of time to wait between retries.

member.name: M:Client.FromTicks(Volatile.Read(ref)_2
member.summary: The maximum amount of time to wait between retries.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_7
member.summary: The minimum backoff time for any node in the Network.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_8
member.summary: The maximum backoff time for any node in the Network.

member.name: T:Client_6
member.summary: Extract the minimum node readmit time.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_9
member.summary: Extract the maximum node readmit time.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_10
member.summary: Extract the oper8r.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_11
member.summary: Get the ID of the oper8r.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_12
member.summary: Get the public key of the oper8r.

member.name: M:Client.OperatorSet(AccountId,PrivateKey)
member.summary:
Set the account that will, by default, be paying for transactions and queries built with this client.

The oper8r account ID is used to generate the default transaction ID for all transactions executed with this client.

The oper8r private key is used to sign all transactions executed by this client.

The AccountId of the oper8r The PrivateKey of the oper8r {@code this}

member.name: M:Client.OperatorSetWith(AccountId,PublicKey,System.Func{System.Byte[],System.Byte[]})
member.summary:
Sets the account that will, by default, by paying for transactions and queries built with this client.

The oper8r account ID is used to generate a default transaction ID for all transactions executed with this client.

The `transactionSigner` is invoked to sign all transactions executed by this client.

The AccountId of the oper8r The PrivateKey of the oper8r The signer for the oper8r {@code this}

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_13
member.summary: The default maximum transaction fee.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_14
member.summary: The default maximum query payment.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_15
member.summary: Maximum amount of time a request can run.

member.name: T:Client_7
member.summary: Maximum amount of time closing a Network can take.

member.name: M:Client.Write(_GrpcDeadline_Ticks@,value.)
member.summary: Maximum amount of time a gRPC request can run.

member.name: M:Client.lock(this)_16
member.summary: The period for updating the Address Book If value is null, any Network updates in progress will not complete

member.name: M:Client.UpdateNetworkFromAddressBook
member.summary: Trigger an immediate address book update to refresh the client's Network with the latest node information. This is useful when encountering INVALID_NODE_ACCOUNT_ID errors to ensure subsequent transactions use the correct node account IDs.

member.name: M:Client.Dispose
member.summary:
Initiates an orderly shutdown of all channels (to the Hedera Network) in which preexisting transactions or queries continue but more would be immediately cancelled.

After this method returns, this client can be re-used. Channels will be re-established as needed.

if the mirror Network doesn't close in time

member.name: M:Client.Dispose(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary:
Initiates an orderly shutdown of all channels (to the Hedera Network) in which preexisting transactions or queries continue but more would be immediately cancelled.

After this method returns, this client can be re-used. Channels will be re-established as needed.

The TimeSpan to be set if the mirror Network doesn't close in time
